texto: If the clicker became useless in grown men's hands, no games to watch, no highlights shown, ESPN left with only test patterns and re-runs of Rudy, wouldn't the indignation level be a whole lot higher? If sports, all sports, all levels, were shut down, wouldn't the big clock be ticking a lot louder? Wouldn't John Boehner be calling the President and vice versa? Wouldn't Ted Cruz have to shut up in a hurry?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Leigh Montville que provoca temas ligados a desenvolvimento pessoal. Ao questionar “If the clicker became useless in grown men's hands, no games to watch, no highlights shown, ESPN …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre desenvolvimento-pessoal, government, sports, com foco em sports.
